artifact_classification: authoritative Step 14 delivery and validation interpretation; no texture package exists

mip_policy.source_delivery: lossless mip 0 only; lower mips are derived consumer data
mip_policy.base_color: 2x2 box average in linear-light space then re-encode sRGB; derived interpretation, never exact source RGB
mip_policy.normal: 2x2 vector average followed by renormalization in tangent space
mip_policy.orm: 2x2 scalar average per channel; metallic must remain exactly zero
mip_policy.alpha: opaque 255 at every mip if alpha exists

filter_policy.mip0_exactness_audit: nearest/point sampling at integer texel centers
filter_policy.dcc_preview: trilinear with 8x anisotropy after exactness audit
filter_policy.future_unreal_sampling: trilinear with project anisotropy; exact rendered-pixel equivalence is not claimed

step15_required_outputs: UV0 implementation on a copy of the approved candidate
native-resolution source-owned masks for five owner views
Base Color mip-0 atlas with byte-exact owned pixels
UV overlap, bounds, seam, density, and padding audit
five owner-view material comparisons plus one perspective corroboration render
candidate review board and artifact hashes

step15_validation_gates.rule: all Step 14 authorities and the approved candidate hash match
geometry vertices, faces, bounds, transforms, and 784 evaluated triangles remain unchanged
one unique 0-1 UV0 layout; zero positive-area overlap; all faces assigned exactly once
no UV1 implementation in Step 15 unless separately included by the Step 15 contract; Step 14 only plans it for Step 16
all five native source windows are in bounds, size exact, and separated by required padding
five deterministic foreground/face masks pass native-resolution visible review with no manual pixel edits
every mask-owned Base Color mip-0 RGB triplet matches its declared source pixel byte-for-byte
every non-owned texel is labeled authored continuation, dilation, or unused; no exact-source claim
C-005/C-006/C-007 remain face-owned, non-emissive, and absent on source-unseen faces
2048 Base Color exists, is lossless 8-bit sRGB, and contains no added AO or color grade
2048 DirectX tangent normal exists, neutral/green orientation passes, and no silhouette/displacement occurs
2048 linear ORM exists with correct packing and blue metallic channel identically zero
AO/bake settings match; no ray miss, inverted normal, contact leak, or margin defect
mip/filter policy is recorded; exactness is limited to source-owned mip-0 texels
one opaque Default Lit material; no emissive input or E texture
five owner-view and one perspective material proofs are clean, correctly oriented, and unclipped
candidate maps/material remain candidate; visual canon and DCC game-ready are false
A001-A004 asset-specific artifacts and quarantined A005 diagnostics are not inputs

step14_pass_status: authoritative plan only; asset remains DCC source candidate
